case_title: DANIEL SOLOMON GOLDSTEIN VS. JASON BECK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDSTEIN, DANIEL SOLOMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BECK, JASON DBA ALTERNATIVE HERBAL HEALTH SERVICES $4,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,330.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH COURT APPROVED MEDIATION AND DID NOT APPEAR FOR TRIAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

HEARING ON REQUEST FOR ISSUANCE OF AN ASSIGNMENT ORDER OF ALL REVENUES ASSIGNED TO DEFENDANT JASON BECK IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DANIEL SOLOMON GOLDSTEIN, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL COLLINS, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF IS TO SUMBIT A PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING ISSUANCE OF AN ASSIGNMENT ORDER OF ALL REVENUES ASSIGNED TO DEFENDANT JASON BECK BY WEDNESDAY SEP-18-2019. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
